title: Authentication Bypass Pattern
description: Hardcoded authentication outcomes or disabled auth checks violate OWASP A07:2021 (Identification and Authentication Failures). Attackers can exploit these to gain unauthorized access without valid credentials.

finding.message: Authentication bypass pattern '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Remove all hardcoded auth bypass paths; use a central authentication middleware.
Apply deny-by-default: require explicit authentication declarations, not opt-out.
Enforce multi-factor authentication for administrative and privileged accounts.
